entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target crop (Cicer arietinum L.) being studied for yield and quantitative traits

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The primary quantitative trait of interest, including grain yield

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: A quantitative trait governing the time from sowing to flowering

entities.name: DAYS TO PODDING
entities.description: A quantitative trait governing the time from sowing to pod formation

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the vertical growth of the plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the total pods per plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the seed count within a single pod

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the total organic matter of the plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A trait representing the ratio of grain yield to total plant biomass

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: NUMBER OF BRANCHES
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the number of branches on the plant

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist ascochyta blight

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting chickpea plants

entities.name: DIALLEL ANALYSIS
entities.description: A mating design used to analyze gene action and combining ability

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different parent lines to produce hybrids

entities.name: GCA
entities.description: General Combining Ability used to estimate additive gene action

entities.name: SCA
entities.description: Specific Combining Ability used to estimate non-additive gene action

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The nature and magnitude of the interaction of genes governing traits

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action where the effect of alleles is cumulative

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action involving dominance or epistasis

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of parents to transmit favorable traits to their offspring

entities.name: GL 98010
entities.description: A chickpea parent line identified as the best general combiner

entities.name: GL 96010
entities.description: A chickpea parent line resistant to ascochyta blight

entities.name: GL 90168
entities.description: A chickpea parent line resistant to ascochyta blight
